channel.title: Mac OS X on This is the one of the solutions
channel.description: Recent content in Mac OS X on This is the one of the solutions

item.title: Install Apache Spark 2 on Ubuntu 16.04 and Mac OS
item.description: Two of the earlier posts are discussing installing Apache Spark-0.8.0 and Apache Spark-1.1.0 on Ubuntu-12.04 and Ubuntu-14.04 respectively. In this post you can discover necessary actions to set up Apache Spark-2.0.2 on Ubuntu 16.04 and Mac OS X Sierra. For enhanced guidance refer above mentioned posts.
